purpose: Declares the MarkdownRenderer facade (BuildPreview/BuildDocument/BuildStandaloneDocument) plus the PreviewDocumentRequest input and PreviewRenderResult output structs that pass markdown source, document title, asset/base directories, and the mermaid toggle from the controller into the cmark-gfm-based renderer.
exports: struct markdownplusplus::PreviewDocumentRequest { markdownUtf8, title, assetRoot, baseDirectory, mermaidEnabled }
invariants: MarkdownRenderer is a static facade with no state; the three Build* methods are pure functions of the request.
BuildPreview returns the WebView-bound document (uses the markdownplusplus.local virtual host for CSS/JS); BuildStandaloneDocument inlines the CSS and resolves assets via file:// for HTML export.
gotchas: PreviewDocumentRequest.markdownUtf8 is std::string (UTF-8) while title/assetRoot/baseDirectory are std::wstring (UTF-16); mixing them is intentional - markdown is passed through to cmark-gfm as raw UTF-8 bytes.
